text: Moving from a modern, glass-walled conference room into this imaginative, R+D-themed installation, I am struck by the transition from the structured world of ideas to the playful, experimental world of creativity. Both spaces buzz with the promise of discovery. Here, I feel lighter—curious and open, as if the boundaries between me and possibility have softened. It's a reminder that all knowledge is provisional, blossoming anew wherever minds meet in exploration.
